params.demand: Arbiter-specific demand data encoded by the escrow creator.
params.escrowUid: The UID of the escrow attestation being fulfilled.
params.fulfillment: The EAS attestation being used as fulfillment.

params._eas: EAS contract used to create and read payment attestations.
params._schemaRegistry: EAS schema registry used to register or reuse the payment schema.

params.expirationTime: EAS expiration timestamp, or zero for no expiration.
params.refUID: Reference UID stored on the EAS attestation.

returns._0: Whether the resolver supports ETH transfers.

params.values: Explicit ETH amounts which were sent with each attestation.

returns._0: Whether all the attestations are valid.

params.attestations: The existing attestations to be revoked.
params.values: Explicit ETH amounts which were sent with each revocation.

returns._0: Whether the attestations can be revoked.

params.attestation: The existing attestation to be revoked.

returns._0: Whether the attestation can be revoked.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

returns._0: Semver contract version as a string.

ATTESTATION_SCHEMA().notice: UID of the schema used by attestations created by this contract.

attest((bytes32,bytes32,uint64,uint64,ui.notice: Processes an attestation and verifies whether it's valid.

doObligation((address,uint256,uint256,ad.notice: Transfers ERC1155 tokens and attests to the payment for the caller.

doObligationFor((address,uint256,uint256.notice: Transfers ERC1155 tokens and attests to the payment for an explicit attestation recipient.

doObligationRaw(bytes,uint64,bytes32).notice: Creates an obligation attestation from pre-encoded data.

getObligationData(bytes32).notice: Loads and decodes ERC1155 payment data from this contract's attestation.

getSchema().notice: Returns the schema record registered for this attester.

isPayable().notice: Checks if the resolver can be sent ETH.

multiAttest((bytes32,bytes32,uint64,uint.notice: Processes multiple attestations and verifies whether they are valid.

multiRevoke((bytes32,bytes32,uint64,uint.notice: Processes revocation of multiple attestation and verifies they can be revoked.

revoke((bytes32,bytes32,uint64,uint64,ui.notice: Processes an attestation revocation and verifies if it can be revoked.

version().notice: Returns the full semver contract version.
